com.wip.dto

Package
Description
com.wip.controller
 
com.wip.service
 
  • Classes in com.wip.dto used by com.wip.controller
    Class
    Description
    CustomerDto
    Data Transfer Object for transferring customer information between the API layer and the service layer.
    ParcelDto
    Data Transfer Object for transferring parcel booking information between the API layer and the service layer.
    RegisterDto
    Data Transfer Object for capturing new user registration details.
    ShipmentDto
    Data Transfer Object for transferring shipment details between the API layer and the service layer.
    TrackingUpdateDto
    Data Transfer Object for transferring tracking update information between the API layer and the service layer.
